title: Apple Sauce!
body:
# 🍎 Apple Sauce Mod — Just a Taste
# 
The Apple Sauce Mod is a small, focused addition to Minecraft that introduces a single new item and a unique tool for crafting it. It's a perfect fit for players who enjoy minimalist enhancements with a touch of charm—and maybe something else.

# 🔧 Apple Crusher 9000™ (Item)
# 
The Apple Crusher 9000 is a handheld utility tool designed for one thing and one thing only: turning regular red apples into something smoother, softer, and more refined.

To use it, simply right-click while it’s in your hand and you have apples and bowls in your inventory. The Apple Crusher will convert them into apple sauce with a soft, rhythmic grinding sound.

# 🍵 Apple Sauce
# 
A thick, mushy food product made from crushed apples. Apple sauce is a single-serve item, lovingly poured into a wooden bowl and ready to consume. Players can hold it, examine it, and even try to eat it. It looks good. It feels right. It’s just… smooth.

Crafted using apples and bowls via the Apple Crusher 9000
Non-stackable (each one is individually portioned)
Has no potion effects, but gives off a very faint particle when held at night
Makes a soft slosh sound when moved in inventory

You may find yourself making more than you need. That’s okay. Sometimes it’s not about hunger—it’s about having it.

# 📋 What Else Does It Add?
# 
That’s it. There are:

No new types of apples
No mobs
No structures
No strange bosses, hidden rituals, or unnatural fog events

Just apple sauce. Just a crusher. Just a good time.

Any rumors about villagers gathering near large collections of sauce, or the Apple Crusher 9000 softly vibrating when placed near enchanted books, are most likely unrelated to the core mechanics of this mod.

# ⚠️ Mod Use Disclaimer
# 
The developers of the Apple Sauce Mod are not liable for any unintended side effects that may occur from prolonged use, including but not limited to:

Apple sauce appearing in unexplored areas
Weird looking new ores
Strange structures spawning
Weird entities spotted in oceans and forests.

These are fake. This was never programmed. It is just an apple sauce mod.

# ✅ Download the Apple Sauce Mod Today
# 
No tricks. No secrets. Just crushed apples in a bowl.
You wanted apple sauce. Now you have it.

_**🍎 Smooth. Simple. Singular. 🍎**_
